query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, IS_NULLABLE 
FROM information_schema.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND TABLE_NAME = 'leads'
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3txBsc7RzZ6puht.faa1fd724e39 --database Cy2Gc9yd7vWL7aTK7BRymU --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, IS_NULLABLE 
FROM information_schema.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND TABLE_NAME = 'leads'
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_DEFAULT	IS_NULLABLE
id	int	NULL	NO
title	varchar	NULL	NO

probability	int	0	YES
expectedCloseDate	timestamp	NULL	YES
status	enum	open	YES
notes	text	NULL	YES
tags	json	NULL	YES
createdAt	timestamp	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	NO
